scripts.dev: tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && cp -r src/main/database/migrations dist-electron/main/database/ && concurrently -k "npm run dev:vite" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && cp -r src/main/database/migrations dist-electron/main/database/ && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.build:mac: vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && cp -r src/main/database/migrations dist-electron/main/database/ && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.build:win: vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && cp -r src/main/database/migrations dist-electron/main/database/ && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.cjs
